dashboard.label: AgentGate Audit
dashboard.description: Every AI-agent action against Splunk that AgentGate has gated. Filter by decision, agent, or policy to investigate.

search.query: | inputlookup agentgate_findings | search status=pending | stats count
index=agentgate_audit earliest=-24h | stats avg(elapsed_ms) as ms | eval ms=round(ms,0)
index=agentgate_audit earliest=-24h | timechart span=15m count by decision
index=agentgate_audit decision!=allow earliest=-24h | spath path=stages{}.details.matched{}.id output=policy_id | stats count by policy_id | sort -count

index=agentgate_audit earliest=-24h | stats count(eval(decision="allow")) as allowed count(eval(decision="block")) as blocked count(eval(decision="require_approval")) as queued by agent_id | sort -blocked

index=agentgate_audit earliest=-24h | spath path=stages{} output=stage_json | mvexpand stage_json | spath input=stage_json | stats avg(elapsed_ms) as ms p95(elapsed_ms) as p95 by stage | eval ms=round(ms,1), p95=round(p95,1) | sort -ms
| inputlookup agentgate_findings | search status=pending | eval matched=split(matched_policies,"; ") | table created_at agent_id tool_name severity summary matched | sort -created_at

index=agentgate_audit decision=block earliest=-24h | spath path=stages{}.details.matched{} output=matched | eval policies=mvjoin(mvfilter(NOT isnull(matched)),"; ") | table _time agent_id tool_name summary | sort -_time
